STS2HOSHINO-EYE_OF_HORUS_RELIC.descripti: At the start of each combat, until you [gold]Reload[/gold], attacks that consume [gold]Ammo[/gold] deal [blue]{BulletVigorPower}[/blue] additional damage.
STS2HOSHINO-EYE_OF_HORUS_RELIC.flavor: Hoshino's favorite shotgun with a simple design.
STS2HOSHINO-EYE_OF_HORUS_RELIC.title: Eye of Horus
STS2HOSHINO-WHALE_TUBE_RELIC.description: Whenever a card is returned to the [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] by a card effect, gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
STS2HOSHINO-WHALE_TUBE_RELIC.flavor: It gets hot even if you stay still.
STS2HOSHINO-WHALE_TUBE_RELIC.title: Whale Tube
STS2HOSHINO-IRON_HORUS_RELIC.description: At the start of each combat, gain [gold]Block[/gold] and [blue]{ShieldPower}[/blue] [gold]Shield[/gold].
STS2HOSHINO-IRON_HORUS_RELIC.flavor: Hoshino's favorite shield. It can be folded for storage.
STS2HOSHINO-IRON_HORUS_RELIC.title: Iron Horus
